name: whippet
description: Config-drift auditor for Claude Code setups: a read-only audit that flags dead plugin/hook/MCP references, fragile local marketplaces, duplicate components, malformed JSON, mistyped settings keys, and orphaned files across settings.json and settings.local.json. One command, /whippet-config, runs the full audit on demand; a quiet SessionStart advisory speaks only when there are errors.
